strings: Is surprised to find {PRONOUN/m_c/self} walking in a foreign land
Wonders how far {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} would have to run to reach StarClan again
Wonders how far {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} would have to run to reach the Place of No Stars again
Eyes widen as {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/realize/realizes} the air here has no scent
Wonders if {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} can embrace this new unknown
